math_recheck: Re-derived all load-bearing formulas against both 1957 JETP primaries (Theory of a Fermi Liquid Eqs 2-35; Oscillations Eqs 4-29); found and fixed a dimensionally-wrong factor (F0 = 3 n m* c^2/p0^2 must be 3 m m*, verified numerically gives 5.4 not 10^55) and a stray scan-artifact 's' in the momentum-flux tensor; effective-mass m*/m=1+F1s/3, compressibility, susceptibility, Pomeranchuk 1+Fl/(2l+1)>0, and zero-sound phi(eta)=(eta/2)ln((eta+1)/(eta-1))-1=1/F0 with F1>6 asymmetric threshold and G/4 spin-wave replacement all confirmed correct.
